---
name: Polish + Release Packaging
about: Finalize map quality and release-ready package
labels: [release]
---

## Objective
Finalize map quality and assemble a release-ready package.

## Scope
- Fix prioritized playtest findings
- Perform final quality pass
- Package and verify release artifacts

## Checklist
- [ ] Resolve all critical issues (or document explicit deferrals with rationale)
- [ ] Resolve high-priority flow/readability/comfort problems
- [ ] Perform final consistency pass across full map
- [ ] Finalize metadata/assets (cover art, map info, version notes)
- [ ] Create release package with correct file set and naming
- [ ] Run final verification playtest
- [ ] Publish final changelog/notes

## Acceptance Criteria
- No blocker issues remain
- Package is complete and correctly structured
- Final verification confirms release readiness

## Deliverables
- Final packaged map artifacts
- Release notes/changelog
- “Ready for release” confirmation comment
